title: Close out epic jux: retro, verify fresh-worktree drivers, PR
description:
Epic close-out — orchestrator work, not an implementer tick.

1. Run epic-close retro: review all diffs, harvest learnings.
2. Verify the fix works end-to-end: create a fresh git worktree (no .git/config driver entries), run any tk command, confirm 'git config --get merge.tick.driver' is now set.
3. Confirm .gitattributes uses merge=tick-activity and has no beads line.
4. Run go test ./... — must be fully green.
5. Open a PR and run CI.
acceptance_criteria: go test ./... green; fresh-worktree driver check passes; PR open with CI green
